title: Crunchy Korean Corn Hwajeon
description: A nutty and aerated Korean dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, fried to a crispy perfection, and can be made dairy-free friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cornmeal, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add in water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape into balls.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Place a quarter cup of shredded mozzarella cheese in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the cheese and press the edges together to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Fry the hwajeon for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Drain the hwajeon on paper towels and serve hot.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
